title: Double Dog Bowl,Non Slip Non-spill Stainless Steel Double Bowl with 1 Pet Food Spoop For Small Dogs and Cats (M, Green)
features: Size:S:28.5*16*5.5cm,This double bowls are 250ml for each bowl; M:34*19.5*6cm,This double bowls are 400ml for each bowl;Please read the size and size chart clearly, and buy the right size according to your pet's needs.Package: 1 Double Bowl and 1 Pet Spoon [Color Random].

Materials:Stainless steel & high-quality environmentally friendly PP plastic, non-toxic,they are heat and corrosion resistance. Flexible high grade silicone mat which is more durable than the plastic ones and healthier for your pet.

Design: Dog cat double bowls design is nowadays' fashion design, needn't prepare 2 bowls for pets, the set of two bowls place either food, water simultaneously,suitable for Cats/Kittens/Puppies and Small Dogs.

Keep floor clean and non-skidding:The double bowls was rolled up design of unde mat, it leaves enough area surrounding their dishes to kee water and food spill when your pets eat.The naturally non-slip silicone stand to keep bowls in a place when pets drink or eat.

Easy clean: Double dishes and mat are easy to separate for cleaning and all dishwasher safe.Tips: When the double bowl is photographed, due to the lighting, the color of the actual received bowl is a little different from the picture shown.
